definition:
A man of the tribe of Levi living at the time of United Monarchy, first mentioned at 1Ch.6.26; 
 son of: Ahimoth (H0287); 
 father of: Zuph (H6689)
 § Elkanah = "God has possessed" or "God has created"
1) Samuel's father
2) a ruler in Jerusalem in the time of king Ahaz
3) one of David's mighty warriors
4) son of Korah
5) several Levites
